ratingDrivers.description: Error responses follow one documented envelope across all sampled failure modes.
Timeout-injection contract tests show bank-connector failures return retryable errors without partial ledger writes.
Error-envelope contract tests and sampled failure payloads contain stable codes but no account numbers, bank tokens, internal IDs, or tenant secrets.
The compatibility matrix and handlers still preserve documented v1 fields, but one deprecated field remains undocumented in the contract appendix.

localAnalysis.rationale: Error responses are predictable, but compatibility drift creates caller confusion.
